system.description:
At 9th level, your mastery of fireworks continues to improve. When you create a firework, you can add one of the following effects:

@UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-adventuring-gear.Item.J6rpZLg9snLe9QFy]{Timed Explosion} When setting this firework you choose an amount of time up to 1 hour. The firework is activated and its effects occur at the chosen time. You choose the point of explosion of the firework when you set it up.

@UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-adventuring-gear.Item.WL0dOcrY5VHiLswW]{Sticky Smoke} When this firework detonates, the smoke or flare it produces leaves behind a persistent adhesive residue. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. Creatures that enter or start their turn in the area must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have their speed halved until the end of their turn.

@UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-adventuring-gear.Item.BHfst60sWYnia7k4]{Scatterburst} The firework bursts into a wide cone of crackling sparks and force. Instead of its usual cylindrical area, the firework creates a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the cone must make a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away and fall prone. The area remains lightly obscured by smoke until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-adventuring-gear.Item.GULMf0CcvF15gq0m]{Soundburst Signal} This firework creates a piercing, coded signal audible up to 1 mile away. The sound is recognizable to creatures who have heard your fireworks before, allowing you to send basic tactical messages (e.g., "retreat," "regroup," "begin assault"). Allies who hear the signal and can see the burst may use their reaction to immediately move up to half their speed.
